humanReview.desktopWorkSession: The product face now reads as a session workspace: left session rail, centered active session, and right review inspector are visible in one 1440x960 viewport.
humanReview.desktopControlCenter: Control Center now reads as a secondary inspector with session workspace summaries instead of the primary product dashboard.
humanReview.mobileWorkSession: The mobile first viewport shows a top operating strip, active session, Korean labels, and no forced three-column layout.
humanReview.mobileSheets: Session list and inspector sheet areas are visible and readable. The viewport screenshots intentionally show their scrolled sheet context; an additional element capture isolates the inspector sheet.

remainingDesignRisks: Some inspector-depth references such as local_record_replay remain technical and should be translated in a later polish pass.
The visible product title still uses 'Work Surface' as a product identifier; future Korean naming may make this more native.
Mobile sheet routing is represented by hash anchors in the no-script reader; the future interactive shell should provide real sheet controls.
The browser reports a favicon.ico 404 during one Work Surface capture; it is non-blocking but can be cleaned up.

openDesignMcp.fallback: implementation followed the mandatory repair pack and local visual evidence
